label: Screen context • Electron editor sentinel dropped; file + branch surface as behavior
notes: Regression guard for the real Cursor/VS-Code failure plus the behavior-signal upgrade: Monaco exposes 'The editor is not accessible…' + a '/' viewport instead of the buffer. The block must NOT contain the sentinel or a phantom 'Viewing:'/'(empty)'. The buffer body is the AX ceiling, so behavior comes from the reliable layer instead — the title names the active file ('Active: editing …') and the bottom status bar's git branch surfaces ('Status: main*'), the same single-token control the on-screen sampler drops as chrome.
